/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libformation_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libformation_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/formation_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/formation_interfaces/msg/detail/leader_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/formation_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/formation_interfaces/msg/detail/drone_state__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
